name: scout
description: Multi-lens project audit that generates actionable tasks (施策) for Claude Code: a /scout skill that gathers deterministic project state, fans out read-only sub-agents across five lenses (current issues, security, industry/peer-project practices via web search, missing measures, safety), then dedupes/scores the findings into prioritized tasks, writes them to the backlog, and hands execution to /flow. Complements compass (single-goal gradient) as a broad-reconnaissance SOURCE. Subscription-native (skill only, no binary, no API key).
